player_news.headline: Resting for playoff preparation
player_news.narrative: Lakers have clinched a playoff spot; LeBron will rest in the final regular-season game.

player_news.headline: Probable for must-win game
player_news.injury_detail: Right ankle soreness, expected to play
player_news.narrative: Thunder need a win to avoid the play-in; SGA expected to play through minor injury.

player_news.headline: Upgraded to active, minutes cap likely
player_news.injury_detail: Returned from illness, may be limited
player_news.narrative: Grizzlies are out of playoff contention; JJJ will play but may see reduced minutes.

player_news.headline: Expected to play, team clinched #1 seed
player_news.narrative: Nuggets have clinched the top seed; Jokić may see fewer minutes.

player_news.headline: Out for season finale (knee)
player_news.narrative: Pistons are eliminated; Cunningham will not play in the final game.

team_news.headline: Lakers clinch playoff spot, resting starters
team_news.narrative: Expect LeBron and AD to rest; bench players will see extended run.

team_news.headline: Thunder in must-win scenario
team_news.narrative: SGA and starters expected to play heavy minutes.

team_news.headline: Grizzlies eliminated, youth movement
team_news.narrative: Young players and bench will get more minutes in finale.
